## Checks

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the stated purpose.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks, or explained why they could not run.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, private paths, generated archives, or real gateway URLs.

## Originality Declaration

- [ ] This contribution is my original work, or any external source is clearly attributed with license compatibility verified.
- [ ] I did not copy code from another project without permission, compatible licensing, and attribution.
- [ ] Any adapted algorithm, paper, snippet, or design pattern is cited in code or documentation where appropriate.
